source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the circuit, each capacitor initially has a charge of magnitude \( 3.50 \, \text{nC} \) on its plates. After the switch \( S \) is closed, what will be the current in the circuit at the instant that the capacitors have lost 80.0% of their initial stored energy?
